text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
// It's the day of the Japan Cup. I've failed to
meet my target values.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
But my margin of loss has decreased. I can do
this.
...Except, I've already been predicted to lose. No.
The data is objective.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Even if I'm to lose, the only thing I can do is verify
it. */
